response.global_summary: The video is a recording of a 3D live performance by the VTuber Usada Pekora, celebrating her 7th anniversary. The video consists of two distinct vocal performance segments. The first segment features Pekora performing 'Watashi Version up!', a song associated with the slot machine 'Oki Doki!'. The second segment, after an intro and bridge, features a performance of 'DESTINY STAR' by Nana Tanimura, which is featured in the pachinko machine 'CR Shin Hokuto Musou'. Both songs are in Japanese.

scenes.description: Usada Pekora performs 'Watashi Version up!' on a 3D stage. She is wearing a bikini-style outfit with rabbit ears. The stage has slot machine-themed visuals in the background.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Ah, invited by the sea breeze, the voices playing, the sound of the waves, drawing near.
Ah, high sky, white clouds, dazzling sea, and the season of love.
You, tanned by the sun, were laughing.
Lots of lights, sparkling.
With a heart in love, a lucky day begins to change.
The hands we connected, look, magic is cast on them.
Just laughing, this is the country of summer.
Upgrade me!
Ah, the sun shining down is dazzling, choosing strawberry shaved ice.
Ah, blue sky, white sand, contrasting pink lips.
Dyed, lips, shy smile.
It's like you're inviting me, my heart pounding.
The heart in love, speed increasing.
The eyes staring, becoming bold.
No words needed, I want to feel the now.
Upgrade me!
The sea reflecting the sunset is orange, the silhouette of the two of us.
Star sand that steals the feet, softly, hey, take me far away.
The heart in love, can no longer stop!
Joined palms, sending a signal.
Nothing needed, a country for just the two of us.
Upgrade me!
With a heart in love, a lucky day begins to change.
The hands we connected, look, magic is cast on them.
Just laughing, this is the country of summer.
Upgrade me!
My brand new day!!!

scenes.description: After an intro and bridge, a second performer appears, and Usada Pekora joins them to perform 'DESTINY STAR'. The stage visuals change to feature the character designs from 'Fist of the North Star'.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:

We keep chasing
Shining DESTINY STAR
Guided to the end of ambition
When facing wishes that cannot be yielded
Destiny begins
(Go straight) Countless
(Far away) Staring at the sadness
Shining DESTINY STAR
In prophecies there is always only 'an answer'
The path to follow depends on yourself
To carve out the tomorrow you should proceed to
The men keep fighting
Even if they throw away their lives, it doesn't matter
Since the day I found
The one thing I want to protect so much I could think that
Whispering DESTINY STAR

From pride that cannot take a step back
Sparks fly

Shining DESTINY STAR

When facing wishes that cannot be yielded
Destiny begins
